specFidelityNotes: Issue #420 adds safe-alembic-upgrade-local.sh with DB-identity resolver, pg_dump to ~/.juli-backups, TTY confirmation/--yes escape hatch, shared row-count verification via safe_alembic_helpers.py, and README/runbook updates. Production safe-alembic-upgrade.sh unchanged. ADR-027 documents migration-safety pipeline from parent #419 grill.
convention_notes: Matches existing infra/scripts safe-alembic-upgrade.sh helper reuse pattern; tests mirror tests/integration/test_safe_alembic_upgrade.py structure.
resolve_db_identity added to safe_alembic_helpers.py with db-identity CLI subcommand consistent with existing row-counts/compare commands.
